form.formComment: Won two starts back over 300m at Healesville. Last start she finished 2nd on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Got Immunity beaten 4.5 lengths (23.40) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. This appears within her reach.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (23.14) in a Grade 5, finishing a 1.1 lengths third. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 450m at Ballarat. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Won her last three in a row including a strong win last start over 400m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Has scored five times from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Mia Neo at this track last start over 400m (23.11). Has good early speed and will stick on.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (23.34) over 400m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate but capable of a better result.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (23.24) at this track over 400m. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Returns from a nine weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut, when a 16.98 winner at big odds over 300m at Healesville. Prefer to watch at this stage.
